overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path at night. The scene features dense coniferous trees, dim moonlight filtering through the canopy, and a cool blue-green color palette typical of nighttime in the game.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path with swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: Dense wall of tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
Dense wall of tall pine trees lining the right side of the path
Narrow winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass
Dark blue night sky visible through gaps in the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt path through a dense coniferous forest at night. Tall pine trees flank both sides of the trail, creating an enclosed feeling, while the dark blue sky is visible through scattered gaps in the canopy above.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with dead tree landmarks

events.description: large dead tree trunk becomes visible on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the forest path, passing by a distinctive dead tree

entered.detail: Large dead tree trunk with bare branches standing beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the dense forest as Geralt passes a prominent dead tree trunk on the right side. The coniferous trees remain close on both sides, maintaining the enclosed forest atmosphere with limited sky visibility.

events.description: forest opens up with trees becoming sparse and more night sky becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward a more open area as the dense forest gives way to a clearing

entered.detail: Open forest clearing with sparse trees and wide view of the night sky ahead

segments.scene_description: The dense forest opens up as Geralt approaches a clearing. The trees become sparse and scattered, revealing much more of the dark night sky ahead. The path remains central but the surroundings transition from enclosed woods to an open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense coniferous forest that gradually opens into a wide nighttime clearing. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt path tightly enclosed by tall pine trees, with only scattered gaps of the dark blue sky visible through the canopy. As the journey continues, the camera passes a prominent dead tree trunk on the right while maintaining the claustrophobic atmosphere of the thick woods. The scene then shifts as the forest begins to thin, with the trees becoming sparse and scattered. Finally, the environment expands into an open landscape, revealing a vast expanse of the dark night sky as the path leads out of the woods.
